hero.title: Samun dama
hero.lead: IATF tana da burin kiyaye wannan rukunin yanar gizon mai sauƙi, mai iya karantawa, mai amfani da keyboard, kuma ya dace da fasahohin taimako.
support: Don samun damar yanar gizo, IATF yana amfani da [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Har ila yau, ana iya samun damar amfani da shi ta hanyar kwarewar kai tsaye na masu amfani da fasahohin taimakawa.

paragraphs: Idan ka sami shinge na samun dama a kan wannan shafin yanar gizon, don Allah a bayar da rahoto ta hanyar imel:
Rahotanni masu amfani sun haɗa da:
items: wane fasahar taimako, mai bincike, ko na'urar da kake amfani da ita, idan ya dace
abin da ya faru ba daidai ba
report.footnote: Ba kwa buƙatar rubuta rahoton kwaro na yau da kullun. Bayani mai ma'ana ya isa.

paragraphs: Ana iya taƙaita al'amuran samun dama a cikin ma'ajiyar jama'a ta yadda za a iya gyara su a buɗe. Ana cire bayanan tuntuɓar mutum da bayanan sirri da ba dole ba kafin bugawa.
Idan rahotonka ya ƙunshi bayanan sirri, ka faɗi hakan a cikin saƙon.
Wannan shafin ne da gangan kananan da kuma mafi yawa a tsaye. Wasu harsuna versions iya zama bai cika ba, alhãli kuwa fassarorin da ake shirya.
